title: phlox speciosa subvar. nitida
intro: Phlox speciosa subvar. nitida, commonly known as the fragrant or smooth phlox, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the phlox family. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Pacific Northwest in North America, where it grows in well-drained soils and rocky areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and antiviral properties, and it is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues. Phlox speciosa subvar. nitida can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat colds, flu, and other infections.
